plugins.name: memory-compiler
plugins.description: Installs Cole Medin's Claude Memory Compiler into any project. Clones the repo, merges hooks into the project's Claude Code settings, and updates .gitignore to enable automatic session capture and knowledge compilation.

plugins.name: secondbrain
plugins.description: Forwards memory-compiler daily logs to a SecondBrain ingest endpoint so per-project session knowledge feeds a personal cross-project brain. Depends on memory-compiler; installs a SessionEnd hook and a stdlib-only forwarder into the target project.
